name: Levi
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") Squad Captain of the Special Operations Squad (known as Squad Levi) within the Survey Corps. He is known as humanity's strongest soldier. Levi is abrasive, blunt, and has a strong respect for structure and discipline. He is a clean-freak, demanding spotless cleanliness of himself, his equipment, and his environment. name: Arataka Reigen
description: __Height:__ 179 cm (5'10.5") [Mob](https://anilist.co/character/89616)'s mentor and boss in the Mob Psycho 100 series. He owns a business exorcising ghosts and is a self-proclaimed psychic. He is Mob's moral compass. He was the first person to ever consider Mob as normal and his teachings have never failed Mob.

name: Guts
description: Guts is the protagonist of Berserk. He is a tall, muscular man that swings a huge sword called the Dragon Slayer, he has a prosthetic left forearm that has a magnetic grip that also conceals a cannon. Renowned as the "Black Swordsman", he is a former mercenary and branded wanderer who travels the world in a constant internal struggle between pursuing his own ends and protecting those dear to him.

description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") Kurisu is a research member in Viktor Chondria University's Brain Research Program. She is also famous in America for writing theses papers, part of which is covered in the news.
